_comment: Local strategies and helpers - executed in frontend browser

strategies._comment: Local strategies - frontend controls chunking/aggregation logic

localStrategies.label: One Embedding per Page
localStrategies.description: Aggregates all text items of one page into a single markdown text

localStrategies.label: Fixed-Size Chunks
localStrategies.description: Merges all content, splits into ~500 char chunks with overlap

helpers._comment: Local helpers - execute entirely in the frontend browser

localHelpers.label: Remove All Logos
localHelpers.description: Finds all images classified as 'logo' and marks them as deleted

localHelpers.label: Remove Empty Text
localHelpers.description: Finds text items with empty or whitespace-only content and marks them as deleted

localHelpers.label: Delete by Regex
localHelpers.description: Prompts for a regex pattern and marks matching text items as deleted
